description:
A backup software for your Mac or Windows PC.


Bug Fixes
- Fixed a regression introduced in 7.44.0.0 in which fully-downloaded cloud-files-API ("Files On-Demand") files — Dropbox, OneDrive, OneDrive for Business, iCloud-on-Windows, Box, Google Drive, and other CFAPI sync providers — were in some cases backed up as their placeholder metadata instead of the file's actual content. Arq now backs up the file's content for hydrated CFAPI files. Arq re-reads each affected file once, then resumes normal incremental backups.
